title: libpod: move NetNS into state db instead of extra bucket
body:
This should simplify the db logic. We no longer need a extra db bucket for the netns, it is still supported in read only mode for backwards compat. The old version required us to always open the netns before we could attach it to the container state struct which caused problem in some cases were the netns was no longer valid.

Now we use the netns as string throughout the code, this allow us to only open it when needed reducing possible errors.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED] Existing tests should cover it and it is only a flake so hard to reproduce the error.

Fixes #16140

I like it. Good change to simplify things. I do suspect this won't help terribly much with the missing/bad NS errors beyond moving where they happen, though.
I like it too. I only added jailNetNS to try to improve code sharing but this looks much better and I'm happy to see it go.
Updated since the latest c/common changes are merged. This is ready for review.
